name: KIROMIC BIOPHARMA INC
summary: KIROMIC BIOPHARMA INC is a clinical-stage immunotherapy company using its proprietary platform to discover, develop and commercialize allogeneic CAR-T (Chimeric Antigen Receptor T-cell) therapies with a focus on solid tumors. The company’s pipeline includes product candidates targeting various cancers. Kiromic Biopharma is headquartered in Houston, Texas.
